title: PrTextQualityReview
description: Output of the pre-approve PR-text formatter stage. Codex (gpt-5.5) reads the proposed PR title + body (markdown) and emits cleaned versions plus a list of every change. Strict JSON, OpenAI-strict-compatible.

fixed_title.description: Cleaned PR title. Unexpanded LaTeX macros (e.g. \sysname, \name), \\ line breaks, font-size commands, and similar markup must be removed or replaced with their intended plain-text rendering.

fixed_body.description: Cleaned PR body in GitHub-flavored markdown. The grokrxiv-review-id marker MUST be preserved verbatim (the webhook depends on it).
